overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment with elevated highways, neon signs, and distinctive red and yellow architecture. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections, and moves through varying lighting conditions from bright sunlight to shadows beneath overpasses.

events.description: child with red hair passes directly in front of the camera
graffiti wall becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a beige industrial wall, approaching an intersection with palm trees visible on the left

blue futuristic sports car driving along the street

sleek blue futuristic sports car driving on the road

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit urban sidewalk next to a beige industrial warehouse wall covered in graffiti. Palm trees and a distinctive red industrial building are visible on the left, while an elevated highway ramp looms ahead. A child runs past the camera and a blue sports car drives along the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: approaching intersection with red traffic light visible ahead
entering deep shadow beneath the elevated highway overpass
beginning to cross the street at the marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and passing under the elevated highway overpass, navigating around vehicles

pedestrian sitting on a bench against the wall under the overpass

low-rise orange commercial building with signage
large industrial metal ventilation grate on the right wall
massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway
futuristic red pickup truck driving on the road
beige sedan parked or moving slowly on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a busy urban intersection beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The lighting shifts dramatically from bright sunlight to deep shadow as they pass under the concrete structure. A red pickup truck drives through the intersection while pedestrians navigate the crosswalks around concrete support pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial walkway with yellow structural elements and neon signage

events.description: turning corner to reveal distinctive yellow angular architectural structure
entering semi-covered area with purple neon lighting from storefront

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past striking yellow structural beams and neon-lit storefronts, observing the futuristic architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the neon-lit storefront entrance
group of pedestrians walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: distinctive bright yellow angular structural beams supporting the building
purple and green neon signage illuminating a storefront entrance
large digital advertisement screen mounted on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a striking yellow architectural structure with angular beams, entering a semi-covered commercial area. Purple neon signs illuminate a storefront on the right while digital billboards display advertisements on the left. The elevated highway remains overhead as pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway with large digital billboards

events.description: passing under large digital billboards displaying advertisements and warnings
approaching more open area at the end of the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway beneath the elevated highway, passing under large digital displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance under the highway

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying advertisements including a brain warning sign
multi-story modern office building with glass and concrete facade
green metal railing reappearing along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through a covered pedestrian walkway beneath the elevated highway, passing under massive digital billboards displaying advertisements. The area is shaded with artificial lighting from the signs, and modern office buildings line the left side while the path continues toward a more open area ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic city, transitioning from a bright, sunlit street into the shaded, neon-lit corridors beneath a massive highway system. It begins on a sunlit sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered warehouse wall, passing palm trees and a red industrial building as a blue sports car drives by. As the character moves forward, the lighting shifts dramatically from brilliant sunlight to deep shadow while crossing a busy intersection beneath a concrete highway overpass. The scene then opens into a semi-covered commercial area characterized by striking yellow angular beams and purple neon storefronts, with digital billboards beginning to illuminate the surroundings. Finally, the camera glides through a shaded pedestrian walkway lined with modern office buildings, moving under massive glowing advertisements toward a more open urban space.
